texto: Every cataclysm is welcomed by somebody
autor: there is always someone to rejoice at disaster and see in it the prospect of a new beginning and a better world.
explicacao: Citação de there is always someone to rejoice at disaster and see in it the prospect of a new beginning and a better world. sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Every cataclysm is welcomed by somebody” articula motivacao, iain-pears, the-dream-of-scipio em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como the-dream-of-scipio.
